# Test Fixtures

This directory contains reusable test fixtures for unit, API, and E2E tests.

## Files

- `sample.txt` — A plain text file for testing text-based quiz generation
- `sample-export.json` — A valid quiz export JSON file for import testing
- `mock-gemini-quiz-response.json` — Mock Gemini API response for quiz generation
- `mock-gemini-summary-response.json` — Mock Gemini API response for keyword/summary extraction

## Planned Fixtures (not yet added)

- PDF fixture (binary, will be added in a follow-up PR)
- Image fixture (binary, will be added in a follow-up PR)

Binary fixtures are deferred because they are harder to review and require special handling.
